---
title: Camille Pouchol
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

**Assistant Professor at MAP5, Université Paris Cité.**

My research interests revolve around **inverse problems**, **control** and **optimisation**.

[Publications](publications.md) ·
[Enseignement](enseignement.md) ·
[Contact](contact.md)

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

![](assets/photo.jpg){width=160px}

:::

::::
